title: tephrosia stormsii var. pilosa
intro: Tephrosia stormsii var. pilosa, also known as the Pilosa Tephrosia, is a variety of flowering plant in the Fabaceae family, native to tropical Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The Pilosa Tephrosia is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, offering benefits such as pain relief, wound healing, and immune system support. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in traditional African medicine to promote overall well-being.
